claimBoundary: desktop WebXR comparator blocker report only; not Quest, production, clinical, or scoring readiness

blockers.currentFinding: Current Reom garment still reads as planar/apron-like in WebXR source-clean screenshot.
blockers.remediation: Source or create a real garment mesh and pass it through local Blender fitter with shrinkwrap/weight transfer; do not replace baseline unless screenshot score improves.

blockers.currentFinding: Arms improved from T-pose but forearms/hands remain stiff and mannequin-like.
blockers.remediation: Tune patient joint rotations and capture before/after WebXR-only screenshots.

blockers.currentFinding: Face/hair surface remains low-detail and mannequin-like, limiting realism even after clothing cleanup.
blockers.remediation: Add source-level material/texture detail or provider comparison for face/hair candidates.

blockers.currentFinding: Comparator now crops to WebXR pane and hides debug panels/cues.
blockers.remediation: Preserve this behavior for future screenshots.

nextQueueItem: Improve local garment generator/fitter side-wrap geometry and rerun comparator.

latestLocalAuthoredCandidate.finding: local-authored curved garment remains planar/apron-like after fitting; do not promote over baseline
latestLocalAuthoredCandidate.nextRemediation: improve fitter/generator to produce side/back wrapped torso geometry with better placement and less rectangular front panel
